name: Akshat Gupta
bio: Product Manager specializing in building data-backed, user-first experiences. I leverage my background in stakeholder management and scaling high-value portfolios to design product strategies that balance business goals with frictionless UX.

experience.description:
Acted as a powerful user proxy, systematically collecting and synthesizing user feedback from high-value HDFC clients to inform product roadmaps and features. 

Mapped user journeys within critical banking workflows to identify user friction points, and collaborated with product and design teams to implement user-first, empathetic solutions.

Translated enterprise client pain points into actionable product and service improvements, leveraging strong stakeholder management to bridge the gap between B2B client needs and internal capabilities. 

Analyzed account health and retention metrics across a high-value portfolio to identify user friction, proactively implementing value-driven solutions that maximized customer satisfaction and minimized churn.
